styleContinuityAnchors.colorSystem: obsidian and graphite neutrals with a single warm metallic gold brand hue
styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: architectural panels with restrained rounded corners and long horizontal lines
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: clean sans serif with display-weight contrast and editorial spacing
styleContinuityAnchors.spacingSystem: broad vertical breathing room with tight internal precision
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: quiet premium controls, framed cards, floating planes, disciplined chips
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: dark layered surfaces with subtle glass film, soft lift, and restrained black-led contrast with yellow and red accents
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: no photography, no decorative icon tiles, abstract object-driven hero only

pages.title: Home
pages.visualNorthStar: A premium innovation studio landing page that feels engineered, multilingual, and future-facing without noise.
pages.compositionPattern: Asymmetric two-column with a horizontal portfolio rail
qualityRisks: hero could become generic if too centered
horizontal rail must remain elegant on mobile
multilingual samples must feel intentional rather than mixed-language clutter

pages.title: Portfolio
pages.visualNorthStar: An elegant studio portfolio page with gallery-like composition, restrained contrast, and a refined sense of authorship.
pages.compositionPattern: Editorial gallery rhythm with offset panels and salon-style case study sequencing
qualityRisks: must feel like a refined studio rather than a generic agency case-study list
needs strong asymmetry without losing clarity on mobile
must stay quieter than flashy portfolio templates
